title: 重构 ask.ts — 换用 agentic-core
description: Vision mandates agentic-lite = agentic-core + agentic-filesystem + agentic-shell. Create agentic-core as a local package that extracts the agent loop (loop, tool dispatch, message management), provider abstraction (createProvider, Provider interface, anthropic/openai adapters), and tool schema from src/ask.ts and src/providers/. Then refactor ask.ts to be a thin <100 line integration layer that imports from agentic-core. Acceptance: ask.ts < 100 lines, agentic-core handles loop+providers, all 107 tests pass, vision gap closes.
